title: Government-Paid Maternity Benefit (GPMB)
text:
Government-Paid Maternity Benefit (GPMB) - SupportGoWhere
Government-Paid Maternity Benefit (GPMB)
Share link
Provides up to 16 weeks of income support for eligible working mothers who do not qualify for Government-Paid Maternity Leave.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to 8 weeks of income support for 1st and 2nd child, capped at $20,000
Up to 16 weeks of income support for 3rd and subsequent child, capped at $40,000
For mothers who do not qualify for GPML due to their employment arrangements
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to 8 weeks of income support for the first and second child, capped at $20,000.

Up to 16 weeks of income support for the third and subsequent child, capped at $40,000.

Who is this for?

For live births

Your child is a Singapore Citizen or becomes a Singapore Citizen within 12 months from birth

Your child's date of birth/estimated delivery date is on or after 1 Jan 2017

Employed or self-employed for at least 90 days in the 12 months before the child's birth

Not eligible for Government-Paid Maternity Leave (GPML) or maternity leave under the Employment Act, except under specific conditions such as end of employment contract or retrenchment.

For stillbirths:

Similar conditions apply, with the following additional criteria:

The date of stillbirth is on or after 1 November 2021

You are a Singapore Citizen at the time of stillbirth or the child’s father is a Singapore Citizen and was lawfully married to the mother at some point between conception and stillbirth

How to apply?

Record employment contract dates or trade/business periods from the 12 months before your Formal Intent to Adopt (FIA) date.

Submit your claim online no later than 15 months after your child’s birth.

An officer will contact you post-submission

Where can I find help?

View more details

MSFCares: 1800 111 2222 
(say ‘GPLS’ when asked for the hotline you want to reach)

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 15 Dec 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
